title: Photon Apps
description: A small, polished gallery of ready-to-use photons: agent-facing apps, developer tools, and trustworthy utilities you can install directly.

sections.title: Agent-Ready Apps
sections.description: Stateful apps with useful UI surfaces and workflows that humans and agents can share.

sections.title: Developer Tools
sections.description: Practical tools for inspecting projects, working with repositories, and reaching the web.

sections.title: Small Utilities
sections.description: Tiny photons that make good first installs and smoke tests.

boards.label: Boards
boards.summary: Agent and human usable Kanban board with custom UI, state, and live updates.

expenses.label: Expenses
expenses.summary: Track expenses, categories, and totals from chat or CLI with persistent state.

team-pulse.label: Team Pulse
team-pulse.summary: Collect async team check-ins and surface status for managers and agents.

deploy.label: Deploy
deploy.summary: Coordinate deployment steps with streaming progress and operator-friendly status.

filesystem.label: Filesystem
filesystem.summary: Read, write, list, and inspect files through a focused MCP tool surface.

git.label: Git
git.summary: Inspect status, diffs, logs, branches, and commits from an agent workflow.

github-issues.label: GitHub Issues
github-issues.summary: Create, list, and update GitHub issues from the same agent control plane.

web.label: Web
web.summary: Fetch pages and extract text when an agent needs lightweight web context.

weather.label: Weather
weather.summary: A simple current-weather photon that demonstrates clean results and UI rendering.

time.label: Time
time.summary: Timezone-aware time utilities for scheduling, coordination, and testing.

sqlite.label: SQLite
sqlite.summary: Query and manage local SQLite databases from agents with a compact API.

math.label: Math
math.summary: One tiny, dependable calculator photon for first-run confidence checks.
